title: Arrow Key Navigation for Metrics Window
story: As a DataTools Pro user browsing metrics, I want to use left/right arrow keys to navigate between metrics when the metrics window is open and no objects are selected, so that I can quickly browse metric details without clicking.
description: Add keyboard arrow key navigation to the metrics window. When the metrics window is open and no objects are selected, users can press left/right arrow keys to cycle through metrics without mouse clicks.
acceptance_criteria: Left/right arrow keys navigate between metrics in the metrics window
Navigation works when no objects are selected
Keyboard navigation updates the displayed metric details
ux_changes: Added keyboard left/right arrow key event listeners to navigate between metrics in the metrics window.
comment_summary: Developer initially implemented up/down arrows, then clarified that left/right arrows were intended. Implemented and deployed to staging. Reporter praised the feature for improving UX.
